name: GOLFTEC Durham
about: GOLFTEC Durham is a golf training and club fitting facility that offers data-driven instruction using advanced technology. The venue utilizes OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide personalized coaching. Services include private lessons, practice memberships, and custom club fittings. GOLFTEC caters to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to experienced players, focusing on measurable improvement through its structured lesson programs.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis with OPTIMOTION technology
Access to launch monitors and video feedback for precise improvement
Custom club fitting with competitive pricing
PGA-certified coaches with a structured teaching approach
Practice memberships available for ongoing development

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor technology mentioned but specific model not specified

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or use clubs provided by GOLFTEC during lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drink is mentioned as being allowed. The venue focuses on golf training without on-site dining facilities.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: The time for a full 18-hole simulator session isn't specified, but typical simulator sessions range from 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While junior programs are mentioned, specific kid-friendly amenities or age restrictions aren't detailed in the provided content.
